steps.title: Identify the bounds
steps.content: The lowest recorded temperature was $28^\circ\text{F}$, and the highest recorded temperature was $64^\circ\text{F}$. So every recorded temperature $t$ must be at least $28$ and at most $64$.

steps.title: Write one inequality
steps.content: Combining the lower and upper bounds gives $$ 28\le t\le 64 $$ The answer is C.
